properties.name: datawise.task-concurrency.enabled
properties.description: Whether task concurrency auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: datawise.task-concurrency.store-type
properties.description: Store backend: auto, jdbc, or in-memory.

properties.name: datawise.task-concurrency.runtime-enabled
properties.description: Whether TaskConcurrencyRuntime starts when a TaskHandler bean exists.

properties.name: datawise.task-concurrency.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Whether default Micrometer metrics listener is registered.

properties.name: datawise.task-concurrency.metrics.prefix
properties.description: Metric name prefix for task concurrency.
